title: erigeron asperulus
intro: Erigeron asperulus, also known as the rough fleabane, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erigeron asperulus include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to treat various infections. Erigeron asperulus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health issues.
